name: bench-creator
description: Capture reproducible AI coding benchmark cases from real repository work.

interface.shortDescription: Capture private, reproducible AI benchmark cases
interface.longDescription: Checkpoint repositories before AI changes, harvest reusable difficulties, validate privacy, and run candidates in restored workspaces.
defaultPrompt: Checkpoint this repository before changes and suggest a benchmark case afterward.
Capture this task as a private reproducible benchmark case.
Validate and run the ready cases in my global Bench.
